provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, lean human male in his 30s with a facial scar and the alert posture of someone who has survived in the Sable Reach long enough to learn when to fight and when to run, wearing a Veshan bronze pauldron on one shoulder that he took from someone who no longer needs it strapped with cargo cable to a cut-down Compact officer coat worn as a vest over a dark thermal undersuit with holes at the elbows, dark scavenged trousers with mismatched cargo pockets sewn on by hand, one Compact boot and one civilian boot neither of which fit perfectly, a custom-modified energy weapon with an extended barrel in a thigh rig made from a belt and wire, his personal color of black and rust-red emerging from the chaos of stolen gear
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
